Model 2 (adding team gender):
PAPER_REPORTED - CS: all gender compositions sig. positive vs MM.
PAPER_REPORTED - Eng: only FF significant.
PAPER_REPORTED - SS: FM and MF significant.

Model 3 (interactions):
PAPER_REPORTED - CS: visibility effect significant; FF and MF interactions negative significant.
PAPER_REPORTED - Eng: FF interaction positive in only 19% of gender-swapped datasets.
PAPER_REPORTED - SS: gender-diverse teams (FM, MF) benefit; interactions not significant.
